data.title: LIIFT4

commerce.title: BODi Membership Required

seo.title: LIIFT4 Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Achieve your fitness goals and transform your body with LIIFT4. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Creator of 10 Rounds™ and LIIFT4®, and co-creator of CORE DE FORCE®, Joel is a NASM certified personal trainer who has spent more than 15 years helping people transform their bodies and change their lives. Take his live strength, HIIT, core, and cycling classes to crush your fitness goals and unlock your athletic potential.

data.descriptionShort: Build muscle and burn calories with classic weightlifting and HIIT cardio.
data.descriptionLong: LIIFT4 combines heavy lifting and intense cardio to transform your body in 4 days a week. And with 32 unique, real-time workouts, you’ll never get bored, because you’ll never do the same one twice.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells or Resistance Bands, Foam Roller, Core Comfort Mat*
modules.categories: Strength, HIIT, Bootcamp, Cardio, Muscle Building

modules.title: Is LIIFT4 Right For Me?
modules.content: LIFT. HIIT. REST. REPEAT. Just 4 days a week. Build muscle and burn fat in 8 weeks with 30–40 minute workouts. LIIFT4 mixes weight training and high-intensity (HIIT) cardio for a complete body transformation.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: For 4 days a week over the next 8 weeks, you’ll build and burn every muscle group. Since each 30–40 minute workout is filmed in real time, you’ll never do the same routine twice.

modules.title: Tools & Equipment
modules.content: You’ll get the LIIFT4 Program & Nutrition Guide, a Calendar, and a Weight Progression Tracker. Essential equipment includes 2 levels of Resistance Bands as an alternative to weights.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Laura C. lost 10 pounds doing LIIFT4
modules.testimonial: I’ve always wanted lean and toned legs, arms, and abs. I could never accomplish that until LIIFT4.
modules.disclaimer: Laura is a BODi employee. Results achieved after completing LIIFT4 using BODi Performance supplements.
